ground_truth:
CYTOPATHOLOGY REPORT

Accession: C24-00892
Date Received: 14/01/2024
Date Reported: 16/01/2024

Patient: Karen White  DOB: 30/11/1983
MRN: 771234
Clinician: Dr. Adams, Endocrinology
Specimen: Fine needle aspiration, thyroid, right nodule
Clinical Dx: Thyroid nodule, 2.3 cm, evaluate.

Specimen Adequacy: Adequate (Bethesda Category I)

Microscopic Description:
Smears are cellular and show a mixture of follicular cells in
spherical clusters, sheets, and single cells.
Colloid is abundant, thin, and watery.
No significant nuclear atypia, nuclear grooves, or inclusions.
No psammoma bodies.
No atypical lymphoid cells.
Macrofollicular pattern predominates.

CYTOLOGIC DIAGNOSIS:
Right thyroid nodule, FNA:
BENIGN (Bethesda Category II)
Benign follicular nodule / colloid nodule

Note: Correlation with clinical, radiological, and laboratory findings
is recommended.

Dr. Steven Park, MD
Cytopathology Section
